courseTitle: Advanced AI, Simulation, and Procedural Systems
title: Procedural Dungeon or Map Game
genericDescription: Generate traversable spaces; validate solvability; balance randomness with authored structure.
specificDescription: Build a game with generated maps that include start, goal, obstacles, rewards, and at least one authored design constraint. Include a seed input and a map validation report.
gradingRubric: 30 pts generation quality; 20 pts solvability validation; 20 pts gameplay variety; 15 pts seed/debug tools; 15 pts notes.
